properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v5 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You called out my name Knew my past, covered my shame This amazing grace You've shown, so patiently You've shown, so patiently

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And You, waited for me Just for me For me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You, waited for me Just for me For me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Where would I be? If You left me God Where would I be? If You left me God Where would I be? If You left me God Where would I be? If You left me God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You waited, waited You waited, waited You waited, waited You waited, waited

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Where would I be? If You left me God Where would I be? If You left me God Where would I be? If You left me God Where would I be? If You left

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You waited, waited You waited, waited (Where would I be?) Where would I be? If You left me God (Where would I be?) Where would I be? If You left me God (Where would I be?) Where would I be?
